short_name: Tranexamic Acid in Traumatic Brain Injury
title: Tranexamic Acid in Traumatic Brain Injury

skipped_criteria: Non-penetrating TBI onset within 8 hours: temporal 'time since injury' logic cannot be expressed with available schema fields.
Isolated TBI (no other significant injuries): no schema field exists to confirm injury isolation.
Mild or moderate TBI severity classification: GCS > 8 partially captures this but severity label cannot be fully encoded.
Patients with coagulopathies: no coagulopathy or clotting disorder field exists in the schema (anticoagulant_use is a partial proxy but not equivalent).
Renal failure patients: no renal function or lab value field exists in the schema.
Patient refusal to participate: consent status cannot be encoded in the schema.
